summary: Comprehensive testing of Hönsgården (Swedish Chicken Coop Management) webapp. All backend APIs (27 tests) passed. Landing page UI fully tested with responsive views (desktop, tablet, mobile). Google OAuth redirect works correctly to auth.emergentagent.com.
critical_code_review_comments: Server.py at 928 lines is acceptable but could be split into separate route modules for better maintainability
All required data-testids are present in the code for testability
CSS uses proper CSS variables for theming consistency
All Swedish text is properly displayed
test_credentials: None required - app uses Google OAuth
seed_data_creation: Test data with TEST_ prefix created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend CRUD APIs work. Authentication requires real Google OAuth flow. Landing page at /api/web/login is fully tested. Authenticated pages (Dashboard, Eggs, Hens, Finance, Statistics, Settings) require login to test. All data-testids are properly implemented for future UI testing.

backend_tests.auth: ✓ Auth endpoints exist and return correct status codes (401 for unauthenticated)
backend_tests.coop_settings: ✓ GET/PUT coop settings working with persistence verification
backend_tests.hens_crud: ✓ Full CRUD: Create, Read (single/list), Update, Delete hens
backend_tests.eggs_crud: ✓ Full CRUD: Create eggs (with/without hen_id), Read, Delete
backend_tests.statistics: ✓ Today, Month, Year, Summary statistics endpoints

landing_page.hero_section: ✓ Hero image with woman and chickens displayed correctly
landing_page.google_login: ✓ Google login button visible, clickable, redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
landing_page.pricing_section: ✓ Gratis (0 kr) and Premium (149 kr/år) cards
